text: Contractor MFA device reset procedure: open Admin Identity, find the contractor account, revoke old device approvals, then send a new enrollment link.
Employee password reset guide: verify the user, reset the temporary password, and remind them to update recovery details.
MFA enrollment policy overview for contractors: approvals expire after thirty days and devices must be registered through the identity portal.
Facilities badge access changes are handled by office operations and do not change identity provider device settings.
